name: The Olman King
personality: Proud, regal, confused about the passage of time
motivation: Protect his tomb and treasures from defilers, return to eternal rest
fear: That his legacy has been forgotten
secret: He knows the true name of Tlaloc which grants power over rain and storms
knows: The true history of the Olman empire
The location of his greatest treasures
willNotShare: The true name of Tlaloc unless truly impressed
mannerisms: Speaks slowly, as if remembering how, gestures with ancient regal bearing
catchphrase: I am the last of the true kings...
notes: Can be reasoned with if party shows proper respect. Knows much but is dangerous.
